name: Butterfly Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------SAUCE---------------------------
1 teaspoon Garlic, minced
3 tablespoons Rice vinegar
3 tablespoons Sugar
3 tablespoons Ketchup
1/4 teaspoon Salt
1/2 cup Water
2 teaspoons Cornstarch, dissolved in
2 tablespoons Cold water
8 slices Bacon, cut into 24 pieces
2 beaten Eggs
1 large Onion, sliced
Shell shrimp, removing only the tail part. Split lengthwise into halves and flatten with a cleaver, pat dry. Place one slice of bacon on each shrimp. Set aside for later use.
Heat wok over high heat until hot. Add 2 tablespoons cooking oil and the sliced onions. Stir fry for 2 minutes or until onions are soft. Add 1 tablespoon Shoyu (thin). Mix well. Remove to serving platter and set aside for later use.
Heat wok again. Add 4 tablespoons oil. Dip each shrimp into beaten eggs and pan fry on side with bacon for 2 minutes over medium heat. Flip and fry another 2 minutes or until golden. Remove and arrange on top of onions.
NOTE: Pan frying may be done by rolling wok to coat sides with oil and placing the shrimp along the sides of the wok. Heat wok again. Use same oil left from frying shrimp. Add garlic and sauce mixture. Bring to boil and stir in cornstarch to thicken. Pour over butterfly shrimp.
